Notice Of Motion To Vacate Settlement

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore of Dahlia Law Group LLP telephone number 510-482-2158 specially appearing for Plaintiff The Education Resources Institute Inc.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the motion was incorrectly titled. The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THE EDUCATION RESOURCES INSTITUTE INC's Motion To Vacate Settlement is
Granted in part. The case will be restored to the civil active list. The court is not vacating the settlement. The settlement still exists. No opposition filed. Order to restore case to civil active list signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
